title: Separating Column Values?
excerpt: I’d like to set up automation to parse items from one board to another. For example, if I create a pulse with an email address field and want to use it as a trigger for sending an email, how can I identify it independent…

posts.author: thecza (thecza)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to set up automation to parse items from one board to another. For example, if I create a pulse with an email address field and want to use it as a trigger for sending an email, how can I identify it independent of the others lumped in with it?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
@thecza Can you tell us a bit more about your use case? Do you need to moved them between boards or groups would suffice?

Here are some of the triggers to move an item to another board:

image2634×1498 334 KB

posts.author: thecza (thecza)
posts.cookedHtml: Use would be when using Zapier to automate, I can extract information from the excel spreadsheet and parse it to a pulse, but the column values (specifically cid’s like email, and phone number) aren’t individually selectable.
